subject: A large minotaur-type warrior in dark plate armor, crouching and advancing with two curved blades, set against ruined urban stonework
description: A heavily built humanoid figure with two large curved horns rising from its head crouches in an aggressive forward stance at center frame. It wears dark plate armor with gold trim across the chest and limbs. In each hand it holds a curved blade — one on the left, one on the right — both clearly visible. Its body language reads as mid-lunge, weight forward. The face is not clearly legible at this resolution. The background shows pale misty stonework — broken stone blocks and rubble suggesting a city that has been fought through. The sky behind is hazy, diffuse white-gray. The overall color scheme is dark blue-black armor against a pale, washed-out stone environment.
foreground: Minotaur-type warrior in dark plate armor with gold trim, dual curved blades in both hands, crouching mid-lunge
background: Ruined stone blocks and rubble; pale misty sky
